name: Procter & Gamble
cat: Consumer Goods / Personal Care & Household Products

political.s: P&G's PAC gives bipartisan support with stated goal of even support between Democrats and Republicans. Recent 2024 cycle shows $599,595 in contributions and $2.79 million in federal lobbying, plus additional state-level spending. Company withdrew support from officials who questioned 2020 election results.

charity.s: P&G demonstrates broad charitable focus through programs addressing education, sanitation, health, and disaster relief. Partners with organizations like UNICEF, Save the Children, and Habitat for Humanity. Gives tens of millions annually through product donations and grants via Greater Cincinnati Foundation.
charity.amt: Tens of millions annually (exact amount difficult to quantify due to product donations)
charity.focus: Education, clean water, sanitation, child/maternal health, disaster relief, community development

environment.s: P&G achieved 60% reduction in Scope 1 & 2 emissions since 2010, maintains zero manufacturing waste to landfill since 2020, and sources 99%+ renewable electricity. Company ranked 4th in Sustainability Magazine's Top 250 Most Sustainable Companies 2025. Aims for net zero by 2040 with 80% recyclable/reusable packaging.

labor.s: P&G has some documented labor compliance issues including $89.7M in penalties since 2000 across 59 violation records. Company prohibits forced labor and child labor but receives criticism for inadequate supply chain oversight. Glassdoor DEI rating of 4.2/5 is strong, though whistleblower retaliation case documented.

dei.s: P&G strongly commits to DEI, with CEO stating 'equality and inclusion is good for our business...this cannot and will not change.' Over 50% of management roles held by women, aspires to 40% multicultural representation in US workforce. Glassdoor DEI rating 4.2/5, 24.6% above manufacturing sector average.

animals.s: P&G tests on animals directly and through third parties where required by law; only 13 of 79 brands are PETA-certified cruelty-free. Company invested $495M+ in non-animal alternatives and no longer tests consumer products unless legally required. However, policy focuses on finished products rather than ingredients where most testing occurs.

guns.s: P&G is a consumer goods and personal care company with no involvement in firearms manufacturing, sales, or distribution.

privacy.s: P&G collects and analyzes consumer data including behavioral tracking and algorithmic profiling for targeted marketing. Company participates in EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework and requires consumer consent for sensitive data uses, but allows data sharing with third-party processors and uses sophisticated behavioral analytics.

execPay.s: CEO Jon Moeller earned $21.9M in total compensation (2025), with $11.5M in stock awards. Company does not publicly disclose CEO-to-worker pay ratio. Senior director (2022-23) earned $21.7M while company criticisms note P&G overlooks living wage and workers' rights issues in supply chain.

fec.committeeName: THE PROCTER & GAMBLE COMPANY GOOD GOVERNMENT FUND

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
